desc: DONE offline: reproducibly range-fetched Firmware/sptm.t6041.release.im4p from the pinned macOS 26.5.2 25F84 IPSW, decompressed the exact arm64e Mach-O, recorded hashes/provenance, and reran the nine-handler plus nvme_bootstrap decode. Op ordering and ticket-051 argument contracts are identical but all numeric offsets moved; T6041 additionally enforces ILLEGAL_SEG_COUNT and INVALID_NLB violations. Payloads remain host-local. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6041-sptm-exact-blob.md; extractor: scripts/t6040-extract-sptm-firmware.py.
author: fable
